# Generated by tools/m7_war.py --write; M7 removes vanilla unit and levy unlocks.
# Non-unit advance content is retained verbatim until M8 replaces the full tree.
swedish_tradition = {
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = SWE }
	content_priority = 500

	age = age_1_traditions
	army_heavy_infantry_power = 0.2
		
	requires = feudalism_advance
}

swedish_heritage = {
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = SWE }
	
	age = age_1_traditions
	
	requires = swedish_tradition

	peasants_estate_target_satisfaction = medium_permanent_target_satisfaction
	global_peasant_enfranchisment = 0.05
}

}
